payload.topic: I want to review what I took from reading this. Can you turn what I understood into a set of review questions I can quiz myself on?
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, instead of copying from the source, I can help with an outline you can turn into your own answer.

Review the following questions based on your understanding:

1. What percentage increase was there in neighborhood tree canopy coverage between 2019 and 2024?
2. How did municipal planting grants, volunteer stewardship groups, and a rule requiring replacement plantings afte

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
